title: stelis diversifolia
intro: Stelis diversifolia, also known as the "Hairy Stelis" or "Vine Stelis," is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis diversifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis diversifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
